title: Spells and whatnot
description: This mod adds magic crystals, unique spells, enchanted robes, and more magical content for a mystical gameplay experience.
body:
![Spells and whatnoz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c85aecf2b0385692f60b628d5acbd52b37b3a2ef.png)




## Frequent Updates!!
This means that updates are coming but we are taking our time. We will not make us any timepressure just for updates.
yes its less content but for that the updates are better and mostly functional. Pls think about sending me a message per discord for new spells or bugs or anything else you think about the mod. the link is at the side of the modrinthpage. thank you

# WHAT DOES THIS MOD ADD?

This mod introduces magic crystals, each with unique abilities. Here are some examples:

# 🪄 SPELLS

### Lightning Spell:

Summons a lightning bolt at a specified location.

### Exile Spell (coming in 0.1.4 update):

Transports the player to another dimension. More details will follow soon.

### Fire Spell (reworked next update):

Functions like a flint and steel but also allows the summoning and shooting of fireballs.

### Letta Spell(coming in future):

Freezes the player completely for 3 seconds.

### Light spell(coming 0.1.4)

Summons an entity that provides light and follows you when holding a specific item. You can "park" the so-called Werlicht by no longer holding the item. Note: This spell is still under development, so visual or gameplay bugs (e.g., the entity not following correctly) may occur.

# 🧥 ARMOR AND ROBES

### Green Robe:

Wearing the full set grants reduced fall damage and a Speed II buff.

Additional robes and armor will be added in future updates.

# WHAT CAN I EXPECT IN THE FUTURE?

Future updates will include more spells, rituals, robes, armor sets, and exciting weapons like broadswords.


--

## ART, 3D MODELS AND STRUCTURES: Hugobert_

## DEVELOPMENT AND IMPLEMENTATION: Qsenja

We recommend using the "JEI" mod until a dedicated recipe book is implemented.
